title: Wooden Dinosaur Puzzle Board, Educational Chunky Peg Puzzle, 6 Colourful Prehistoric Pieces, Ages 12+ Months
features: EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Chunky wooden peg puzzle featuring 6 vibrant dinosaur pieces, perfect for developing fine motor skills and shape recognition in toddlers aged 12+ months
DESIGN FEATURES: Colourful prehistoric-themed puzzle board with detailed jungle background scene and easy-grip dinosaur pieces for small hands
QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from durable wooden materials with smooth, child-safe edges and non-toxic paint finishes for lasting play value
LEARNING ELEMENTS: Helps children develop hand-eye coordination, problem-solving skills, and early dinosaur recognition through engaging play
SIZE AND CONTENTS: Compact puzzle board with 6 removable dinosaur pieces including T-Rex, Stegosaurus, and Brontosaurus in various bright colours
description: Introduce your little one to the fascinating world of dinosaurs with this charming wooden puzzle board from Lussies. Perfect for children aged 12 months and up, this delightful prehistoric-themed puzzle features six chunky, easy-to-grasp pieces in vibrant colours. Each dinosaur piece - including a fierce T-Rex, gentle Brontosaurus, and other beloved prehistoric creatures - sits in its own designated spot against a cheerful jungle backdrop. The puzzle helps develop essential skills like hand-eye coordination, problem-solving, and shape recognition while sparking imagination about the age of dinosaurs. The chunky wooden pieces are perfectly sized for small hands, making them ideal for toddlers learning to manipulate objects. The colourful artwork brings each dinosaur character to life with friendly faces and bold designs that will capture your child's attention. This sturdy wooden puzzle provides an engaging way to learn about different dinosaur species while having fun with shapes and colours.
